sizes_section.title: How the mosaic will look
sizes_section.description: Choose the size of your future painting. Each size has its own characteristics and is suitable for different rooms.

sizes.30x40: Standard size, suitable for any room
sizes.40x40: Square format, looks great on the wall
sizes.40x50: Rectangular format, suitable for living room
sizes.40x60: Large size, creates an accent in the interior
sizes.50x70: Maximum size, the main decoration of the room

advice.title: Useful tip
advice.content: When buying, pay attention to the number of colors and the size of the painting. For beginners, we recommend kits with a small number of colors (up to 20) and a size of 30×40 cm.

items.question: What is diamond mosaic?
items.answer: Diamond mosaic is a modern form of needlework where you create pictures by placing rhinestones on an adhesive base according to a pattern.

items.question: How long does it take to create a mosaic?
items.answer: Creation time depends on size and complexity. Small mosaics (21×30 cm) can be made in 1-2 days, large ones (50×70 cm) - in a week.

items.question: Do I need special tools?
items.answer: No, everything you need is included in the kit: rhinestones, pattern, adhesive base and tweezers for laying out.

items.question: Can I fix mistakes?
items.answer: Yes, rhinestones are easily removed and re-glued if you notice an error.

items.question: How to care for the finished mosaic?
items.answer: The finished mosaic can be covered with varnish for protection and hung on the wall like a regular painting.

diamond_art.title: What is Diamond Mosaic?
diamond_art.description: Diamond mosaic is a modern technique for creating paintings where special rhinestones are used instead of paints, which are glued to an adhesive base according to a pattern.
diamond_art.step2: Our system automatically creates a pattern
diamond_art.step3: Glue rhinestones according to the pattern and get a masterpiece
diamond_art.highlight_description: Create complex paintings without artistic skills
